summary: Executed the post-cooldown StackOverflow lane directly after the scheduled slot missed, confirmed it still produced no fresh placement-ready outcome, then repaired the lane so it stops appending outreach noise and stops reselecting the same exhausted packet in the current review window.
why_now: The scheduled StackOverflow demand-capture slot for 2026-05-24 11:30 CEST did not produce a live placement.
A manual-ready packet had already been delivered earlier in the same review window, so another packet refresh would have been fake progress.
The direct rerun at 2026-05-24T11:48:18+02:00 still found only the same already-drafted question and created 0 fresh drafts.

behavior_changes: Pure StackOverflow draft reuse with 0 new drafts no longer appends to outreach-log.md.
An overdue post-cooldown StackOverflow slot that reruns and still produces only stale reuse is treated as exhausted for the current review window.
The distribution selector now holds for a different executable window instead of steering back into the same exhausted StackOverflow lane.

next_lane_state.reason: The post-cooldown StackOverflow slot already burned without a fresh outcome, and the other external lanes are still in-flight; hold for a genuinely different executable window instead of rerunning the same demand-capture search.

replacement_condition: If a first-class StackOverflow posting surface becomes available later, revive the lane with a genuinely new placement path; otherwise keep spending fresh slots on different executable lanes or stronger local repairs.
